nasb.text: of the sons of Shecaniah who was of the sons of Parosh, Zechariah and with him 150 males who were in the genealogical list;

esv.text: Of the sons of Shecaniah, who was of the sons of Parosh, Zechariah, with whom were registered 150 men.

cnv.text: 屬示迦尼的子孫，就是屬巴錄的子孫有撒迦利亞，與他一起登記在族譜裡的男丁有一百五十人。

ccb.text: 巴录的后裔、示迦尼的子孙有撒迦利亚及一百五十名同族谱的男子；
